services.name: Basic Mobile Wash
services.description: A thorough hand wash and detail for drivers who want their vehicle looking clean and sharp without the wait at a car wash.
features: All windows cleaned inside and out
Hand dry to a streak-free finish
services.note: Larger SUVs and trucks may have a small upcharge.

services.name: Gold Detail
services.description: Our most popular package. Goes beyond the surface to give your interior and exterior the professional attention they deserve.
features: Everything in the Basic Mobile Wash

services.name: Diamond Detail
services.description: The full transformation. Our signature service restores paint clarity, seals in protection, and refreshes every inch of the interior.
features: Premium hand wax and sealant application
Full interior restoration and deep clean

services.name: Window Tint
services.description: Professional window tint installed with precision. Reduce glare, block UV rays, and give your ride a sleek, finished look.
services.note: Tint is performed at a location we provide after booking confirmation.

services.name: Black Diamond Package
services.description: The ultimate combo. Full Gold Detail plus complete window tint in one booking — and save.
features: Full Gold Detail (wash, interior, vacuum, wipe down, windows)

services.name: Custom Quote
services.description: RVs, boats, fleet vehicles, oversized trucks, and specialty jobs — priced based on size and condition.
